name: Stock Chart Monitor Template
description: Template pack for an app that opens a charting workspace, navigates to a symbol, captures repeated chart states, and queues them for another utility to analyze.

queue.consumerHint: Another utility can poll /api/captures/recent and /api/captures/timeline for the latest frames and notes.
queue.analysisHint: Treat price-panel and chart changes as decision inputs. Use capture batches plus annotations to drive downstream strategy evaluation.
